items.title: Add TryRepurpose.com — AI content repurposing for remote work creators
items.description:
## Resource Submission: TryRepurpose.com

Hi! I'd like to suggest adding **[TryRepurpose.com](https://tryrepurpose.com)** to this list.

**What it does:** TryRepurpose.com is an AI-powered content repurposing tool that transforms long-form content (blog posts, videos, podcasts) into multiple formats -- social media posts, threads, newsletters, and more -- automatically.

**Why it fits here:**
- Saves hours of manual content reformatting
- Supports developers, creators, and marketers who build and share content
- Free tier available, no credit card required

Would love to have it included! Happy to provide more details if needed.
